archetype.name: Red Mantis Assassin
archetype.note: This archetype offers Opportune Backstab at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Opportune Backstab
feat.text: When your enemy is hit by your ally, you capitalize upon the distraction. Make a Strike against the triggering creature.

traits.name: Rogue
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the rogue class.

feat.trigger: A creature within your melee reach is hit by a melee attack from one of your allies

sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
